message:
Merge polecat/valkyrie/gt-v95d: witness race conditions and error handling

Fix-merge: resolved conflict with gt-5rne (ZFC). Kept ZFC approach (no
escalation from Go code) while incorporating valkyrie's error chaining
pattern and spawn_count mutex fix.

Changes:
- Error preservation in handlePolecatDonePendingMR (chain, don't drop
- Error chaining in handleZombieRestart (chain wisp + restart errors)
- Race condition fix: sync.Mutex on recordBeadRespawn

Fixes: gt-v95d
Worker: valkyrie
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)
